business.name: Anything Plumbing
business.tagline: Same-day fixes when you need them most

hero.headline: Water heater died? We'll have you hot *within 24 hours*
hero.subheadline: 4.9 stars from 68 Huntsville neighbors who know what it's like when the water goes cold at the worst possible time.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every pipe, every leak, every time
services_section.subheading: From mystery leaks to complete water heater swaps — if it touches water, we handle it

services.title: Water Heater Replacement
services.description: 17-year-old Rheems to brand new in 24 hours. We update the plumbing while we're at it, so everything works better.

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: Hidden leaks that other plumbers missed? We find them fast and fix them right, keeping your yard intact.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing
services.description: Monday morning disaster? We're already on our way. Quick response when your day depends on it.

services.title: Plumbing Updates
services.description: Older homes need modern solutions. We upgrade your plumbing to work with today's fixtures and demands.

about.heading: Huntsville plumbers who show up ready
about.body: When we say we'll be there, we mean it. 4.9 stars from 68 neighbors who've watched us work through everything from quick fixes to full system replacements. We keep parts on the truck, explain what's happening, and leave your place better than we found it.

reviews.name: Sharon B.
reviews.text: Called Monday, new water heater by Wednesday. 17 years old to brand new Rheem 50-gallon, plus updated plumbing. Price beat the other quote by plenty.

reviews.name: Christopher T.
reviews.text: Quality work with real pride behind it. 17-year-old water heater replaced within 24 hours of my call. Fair price and clear communication throughout.

reviews.name: Scott L.
reviews.text: Mystery leak that stumped another plumber? They found it fast and fixed it right. More thorough and affordable than anyone else we tried.

reviews.name: Belinda C.
reviews.text: Every single time we call, they answer and get it done quick. Even squeezed us in between jobs when their schedule was packed.

cta.heading: Water emergency or planned upgrade?
cta.body: Same-day response for disasters. Fair quotes for replacements. Call now and we'll head your way.
